dialogos.texto_en: That was SO much fun!\nI was able to swim to my heart's content! Swimming in the \nocean is always fun, but the Okinawan ocean is the best!
Yotsuba has too much stamina...\nHow is she able to swim all day long...?
The barbecue was also delicious.\nToday truly was a wonderful day.
I've had so much fun I got really tired.\nDo we have any other plans for today?
We don't have anything until dinner.
That means we have some free time then.\nI think everyone is tired.
I agree.\nI'm going to take a nap in my room.
Same here. I'll go back to my room and take a nap.
Ichika, aren't you sleeping too much?\nYou were also sleeping at the beach, right?
I was playing with a float.\nI don't take naps during the day.
Hey, what about you, Futaro?
I'm also tired, so I'll rest in my room.\nSee you guys later.
Y-yeah, sure. Take your time.
Well then, I'll rest too.\nCan I visit your room, big bro?
Sure, come on.
Why don't you give Futaro some alone time?\nBeing too controlling is a burden for him.
I'm not controlling him.
He needs his own time too.
I understand that.\nI know I'm being selfish...
Teehee.
What? Ichika.
Nino was so cute, when she was worrying about Futaro-kun.
D-don't tease me!
Anyway, what are you gonna do until dinner, Yotsuba?\nItsuki?
I was going to Kokusai dori to look for souvenirs.
Okay, then I'll go too.\nLet's get a souvenir for Dad.
I'll go as well.\nIt's a waste to just laze around in the room.
Is it okay for you two to stay behind, Ichika, Miku?
Yeah. We'll leave Dad's souvenirs to you.
Take care of yourself guys!
